title: fumaria capreolata var. muralis
intro: Fumaria capreolata var. muralis, also known as Wall Fumitory, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the fumitory family. Traditionally, Wall Fumitory has been used for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's health benefits include treating various conditions such as kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and rheumatism, as well as being used as a tonic to improve overall well-being. Wall Fumitory can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms associated with these conditions.
